title: Whole Cake Island Comes Into View
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Unknown person #14, Reiju, Sanji, Unknown person #15 as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Precisely 26 years ago...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Feels like ages since we've shown the poneglyph to gol D. Roger and his crew.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The Pirate King?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Afterwards, Roger made it to rafflel and became known as "pirate King".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I believe that Duke Inuarashi and Master Nekomamushi ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are seeing similarities between their crew and yours.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They must be confident that you lot will become people who...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: will end up needing the "road poneglyph"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHAT WILL YOU DO AFTER YOU DEFEAT KAIDO?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: WHA... that's so far in the full...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After that, you will surely need to make use of the road poneglyph big mom possesseses!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if this is the case, you will not have a better opportunity than this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seeing as how we've been able to sneak this far into her territory...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would be wise for you to steal her road poneGlyph...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: In addition to rescuing your crewmate Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, Robin did ask us to do pretty much what you just said so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When we arrive at the island, would you mind buying me a bit of time?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I promise that I will successfully steal the pone- glyph this time around!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What?! if it's for our sake,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Then we'll go with you!!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: No... Please focus your attention on Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Things will get far more complicated once you've managed to take him back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...OH YEAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alrighty then, I'll leave it to you!! Shishishi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Wait, that sounded way too easy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: OK, then that's the plan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hahaha.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Anyone seems

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I suppose Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Was simply born with 74Is kind of fate!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: YOHO HO...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hm? You say some- thing brook?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, nothing... I'm not much different I guess...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You'll get no argument from me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: YOHO HOHO~

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The ants are awake!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The next morning

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Heeey!!! Wake up, guys!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We're here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: WOA- Aah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It's whole cake Island!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It's an actual cake!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's Ginormous!!! So this is the island where a yonko lives!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The tallest cake you can see in the distance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Castle ...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Nami, should I continue going straight?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes! I've heard that that that CHAT CAPE OVER there is the only location where the security doesn't make their rounds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: There's someone standing at the coast!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're about to set foot on the Island where a Yonko resides!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 51 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
